description.value: Price +2 bonus; Aura strong conjuration; CL 14th; Weight – DESCRIPTION A disruption weapon is the bane of all undead. Any undead creature struck in combat must succeed on a DC 14 Will save or be destroyed. A disruption weapon must be a bludgeoning melee weapon. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells heal; Cost +2 bonus.
